param.value: "As a Para Bank user, login should be successful with valid credentials"
"As a Para Bank user, login should fail with invalid credentials"

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //*[text()='Error!']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

param.value: "As a Para Bank user, login should fail with invalid credentials"
"As a user of the Para Bank application, the login should behave based on Excel-driven credentials"
"As a user of the Para Bank application, the login should behave based on Excel-driven credentials"
"As a user of the Para Bank application, the login should behave based on Excel-driven credentials"
